name: Usercentrics Consent Management Platform API
what_it_does: Consent management platform (CMP) with REST API — collecting, storing, and managing user consent for GDPR, ePrivacy, CCPA, and TCF2 compliance, with automated cookie scanning, consent record keeping, preference center, Data Subject Rights (DSR) management, and analytics dashboard for privacy compliance teams.
use_cases: Implementing GDPR-compliant cookie consent on websites and mobile apps via Usercentrics SDK
Querying user consent records via Usercentrics API for downstream compliance verification
Automating Data Subject Rights (DSR) requests (access, deletion) via admin API
Integrating consent status with CRM for consent-aware marketing activation
Generating compliance reports and consent audit trails for GDPR documentation
not_for: Full GDPR compliance program (CMP is one component — also need DPA, policies, training)
Large enterprise needing deep custom consent flows (OneTrust for complex enterprise needs)
Non-privacy data management (use a CDP for customer data management)
best_when: A European business or any company with EU/California users needs a well-documented CMP with strong TCF2 support, good developer APIs, automated cookie scanning, and competitive pricing vs enterprise alternatives.
avoid_when: You're a very small website with basic cookie needs (free tools suffice), or need complex enterprise consent orchestration across hundreds of apps.

auth.notes: API key from Usercentrics Admin Interface. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks — must poll for consent data. JavaScript SDK (browser) and mobile SDK for consent collection. Consent data API for querying user consent records. Smart Data Protector for automatic tag blocking. TCF2 vendor list management. CMP ID required for TCF2 registered status.

pricing.notes: German company (Munich). Founded 2017. Raised $100M Series C (2021). Backed by Aperiam Ventures, Cavalry Ventures, LGT Lightstone. TCF2 certified (IAB Europe CMP ID #6). 100,000+ customers globally. Automated cookie scanner (Smart Cookie Scanner) differentiator. A/B testing for consent notices. Consent analytics dashboard. GDPR, ePrivacy, CCPA, LGPD, PDPA support. Used by BMW, Volkswagen, Telekom, Hugo Boss.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per plan; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for consent data, services, and reporting. API key auth. Good developer documentation. JavaScript SDK is primary collection mechanism. No webhooks — polling required. Smart Cookie Scanner automated cookie discovery. TCF2 vendor list automatically maintained. DSR handling via admin API. Consent records queryable by user consent ID.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Consent reads fully idempotent. Service configuration reads idempotent. Reporting reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — must poll for consent data changes; implement consent ID tracking in your system
Smart Cookie Scanner may miss cookies loaded by third-party scripts — manual verification needed
TCF2: CMP must be registered with IAB Europe — Usercentrics is registered (CMP ID #6)
ePrivacy: cookies must be blocked until explicit consent — configure Smart Data Protector
Free tier limited to 2,500 sessions/month — production websites quickly exceed this

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, TCF2, ePrivacy compliant. EU data residency (Germany). API key auth. German company with GDPR-first design. Consent records are legal evidence — store durably with timestamps. User consent ID must be maintained for consent recall and DSR. TCF2 signal integrity critical for programmatic compliance. Smart Cookie Scanner data helps compliance auditing.
